projects.desc: Tracking for feeding, sleep, and diaper changes, family collaboration reminders, and multi-format data import/export.
children: Web app built with TypeScript + React + Vite SSR; backend with Hono + tRPC + Better Auth; data layer with Drizzle + PostgreSQL. Key challenges: consistency in a unified event model, permission control for family collaboration, and reliable real-time synchronization for timers and task reminders.
Built the "Naike" WeChat native mini program on Skyline, tackling token refresh, subpackage routing, and complex state synchronization while balancing performance, stability, and maintenance cost.

projects.desc: Built with Next.js + React + TypeScript, featuring multi-format subtitle parsing, timeline synchronization, and IndexedDB persistence.
children: Implemented a WebCodecs player with progressive MP4 range streaming and precise seeking, plus audio-video sync strategies (frame dropping, frame compensation, and delay correction) and a balance between audio quality and low latency under variable playback speeds.
Built media-kit, a media infrastructure library including time markers, audio waveform, file uploader, edit history, and workspace storage.
Tianjige (Classroom Project Log Monitoring Platform): Customized multi-axis synchronized virtual scrolling for lag-heavy pages, reducing lag time from 9s to 3s.
1v1 Web Teaching Client: Owned layout adaptation, implemented px2em with a custom Vite plugin, and delivered WebAudio-based audio effects.

Teaching PC: Maintained a legacy multi-repo architecture where subprojects were consumed as libraries by the main project; optimized webpack config, upgraded dependencies, integrated Module Federation for hot updates, and added subproject rollback support.
